# anysearch Search API Provider Matrix

Providers: 23. Unified parameters and response fields supported via anysearch.

## Baidu · SerpApi
- Docs: https://serpapi.com/baidu-search-api
- Env: SERPAPI_API_KEY, SERPAPI_KEY
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: full
- Date range: none
- Safe search: full
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: balanced: $25 starter; ~$7.25-$15 volume
- AI Answer: partial
- Full text: none
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: full

## Bing · SerpApi
- Docs: https://serpapi.com/bing-search-api
- Env: SERPAPI_API_KEY, SERPAPI_KEY
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: full
- Date range: none
- Safe search: full
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: balanced: $25 starter; ~$7.25-$15 volume
- AI Answer: partial
- Full text: none
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: full

## Brave
- Docs: https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com/app/documentation/web-search/get-started
- Env: BRAVE_API_KEY, BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: full
- Date range: full
- Safe search: full
- Mode: balanced, deep
- Pricing / 1K: balanced/search: $5-$9; deep/answers: $4 + tokens
- AI Answer: full
- Full text: partial
- Summary: none
- Highlights: full
- News: full

## DuckDuckGo
- Docs: https://pypi.org/project/ddgs/
- Env: (none — keyless)
- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: none
- Date range: none
- Safe search: full
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: $0 API fee via keyless DDGS client; unofficial/fragile
- AI Answer: none
- Full text: none
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: none

- Safe search: full

- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: none
- Date range: none
- Safe search: none
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: balanced/search: 1 credit; with scrape: +1 credit/result
- AI Answer: none
- Full text: full
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: full

- Language: none
- Date range: none
- Safe search: none
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: balanced grounding: $35 + model tokens

- Country: full

- Full text: full
- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: none

- Language: full
- Date range: none
- Safe search: none
- Mode: balanced, deep

- Domain filters: none
- Country: full
- Language: full
- Date range: none
- Safe search: none
- Mode: balanced
- Pricing / 1K: balanced: published plans vary; roughly $2-$4+

- Summary: none
- Highlights: none
- News: full
